name: Lincoln Park District
description: Come play pickleball at Lincoln Park District in Lincoln, IL! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Mount Pulaski North Park
description: Mount Pulaski North Park is a place to play pickleball in Mount Pulaski, IL. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.
